overall.description: A cinematic third-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city street at night, featuring neon-lit storefronts, digital billboards, and pedestrians with futuristic umbrellas. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), following a character along a covered sidewalk beneath elevated highways with heavy atmospheric rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered commercial sidewalk with digital billboards and palm trees

events.description: begins walking along the rain-soaked covered sidewalk from the intersection
camera settles into steady walking pace observing the neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, observing the neon-lit storefronts and passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person holding a purple glowing umbrella walking in the same direction

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing shelter from rain with integrated strip lighting
futuristic digital speed limit display showing '40' in white text
large glass storefront with 'AVANTE' signage visible through the rain
large illuminated advertisement screen showing pink and white imagery
tall palm tree trunk wrapped with greenery along the sidewalk edge
tall black pole with traffic signals showing green light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic intersection at night, with heavy rain falling on wet paved tiles. The camera moves along a covered sidewalk beneath an overhead concrete structure, passing a digital speed limit sign and traffic light. Neon-lit storefronts and large digital billboards illuminate the scene while pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walk ahead, and futuristic cars move along the multi-lane road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-end retail corridor with JINGUJI boutique and luxury advertising displays

events.description: camera begins closely following a character with a white vest and geometric umbrella
passing the illuminated JINGUJI storefront with luxury signage

agents.ego_description: closely following a character wearing a white vest and carrying a distinctive geometric umbrella while walking past high-end retail

notable_agents.action: character in white vest and dark sleeves carrying a futuristic geometric umbrella

entered.detail: luxury clothing store with illuminated 'JINGUJI' signage and dark modern facade
tall vertical advertisement display showing athletic figures with 'FERUID' text
raised concrete wall with lush green tropical plants and integrated lighting
modern concrete seating structure with a person sitting wearing bright red shoes

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the covered walkway, now closely following a character with a distinctive geometric umbrella and white vest. The scene features the high-end JINGUJI boutique on the right with illuminated signage, while large digital billboards display advertisements on the left. The walkway is lined with planter walls containing tropical greenery, and the rain continues to fall heavily beyond the shelter of the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional walkway approaching underpass with mixed pedestrian traffic

events.description: camera overtakes and passes the character with the geometric umbrella
passing a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing down the walkway at a steady pace, passing various pedestrians with colorful umbrellas while approaching a large underpass structure

notable_agents.action: person carrying a glowing purple umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large elevated highway or monorail structure with support columns spanning across the street ahead
illuminated advertisement with 'WET DREAM' text visible on the left side
yellow-topped concrete dividers separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera overtakes the character with the geometric umbrella and continues toward a massive underpass structure ahead. The walkway becomes more open with concrete barriers lining the street edge, while digital billboards including one displaying 'WET DREAM' line the left side. Pedestrians with various colored umbrellas—including a distinctive purple glowing one—pass by in both directions as the camera approaches the intersection beneath the elevated highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic city street that transitions from a dense intersection into a wide, open underpass. It begins beneath a concrete overhead structure, gliding past digital speed limit signs and neon-lit storefronts while pedestrians with glowing umbrellas navigate the wet paved tiles. As the camera moves forward, it closely follows a character in a white vest with a geometric umbrella, passing the illuminated signage of the JINGUJI boutique and tropical greenery lining the walkway. The scene then expands as the camera overtakes the character, moving past a series of digital billboards including one for WET DREAM. Finally, the perspective opens up toward a massive underpass structure, passing pedestrians with purple glowing umbrellas as it approaches the intersection beneath the elevated highway.
